tasks.title: Add car SVGs (Freight, Passenger, Caboose)
tasks.description: Create top-down SVG rendering functions for 3 car types matching locomotive aesthetic. Freight = brown box with door, Passenger = blue with windows, Caboose = red with cupola.
tasks.acceptance: createCarSVG('freight'), createCarSVG('passenger'), createCarSVG('caboose') each return valid SVG elements

tasks.title: Add car palette items
tasks.description: Add Freight, Passenger, Caboose to sidebar palette under a new 'Cars' section with divider
tasks.acceptance: 3 new palette items visible below train section, each showing car SVG preview

tasks.title: Car state management
tasks.description: Add state.cars array, CAR_TYPES constant, MAX_CARS=5. Include cars in undo/redo stack, serialize/deserialize, clearAll.
tasks.acceptance: Cars persist through save/load/undo, max 5 enforced, caboose auto-sorts to end

tasks.title: Drop cars onto locomotive
tasks.description: Drag car from palette and drop onto locomotive cell to append to train. Reject drops on non-locomotive cells with toast. Max 5 cars enforced.
tasks.acceptance: Can add all 3 car types by dropping on loco cell, toast for invalid drops

tasks.title: Static car rendering on grid
tasks.description: In stopped state, render cars on track cells behind locomotive by tracing backward along connected track. Show car count badge on locomotive cell.
tasks.acceptance: Cars visible on grid cells behind locomotive, oriented correctly along track direction

tasks.title: Animated car following with position history
tasks.description: During play, cars follow locomotive using distance-based position history ring buffer. Each car reads position at offset = (carIndex+1) * spacingDist from current locomotive position.
tasks.acceptance: Cars follow locomotive smoothly through curves without jitter, consistent spacing maintained

tasks.title: Right-click car removal
tasks.description: Right-click on a static car cell removes that car. Right-click on locomotive cell with cars removes locomotive and all cars. Car removal takes priority over track removal.
tasks.acceptance: Right-click on car removes it, removing loco clears all cars

tasks.title: Ghost preview and drag handling for cars
tasks.description: Show car SVG as ghost when dragging from palette. Locomotive cell shows green highlight, other cells show red. Handle car types in showGhost and showCellGhostPreview.
tasks.acceptance: Ghost cursor shows car SVG, locomotive cell highlighted as valid drop target

testing_focus: All 3 car types addable and removable
Cars follow locomotive smoothly through curves
Consistent spacing between cars during animation
Caboose always stays at end of train
No regressions in drag/drop, rotation, random, play, smoke, celebration
